ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the battery in kWh */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery (e.g., Lithium-ion, Nickel-Cadmium) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  "charging_method" TEXT /* Preferred charging method (e.g., Fast Charging, Slow Charging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging session */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being charged */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the charging session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the charging session */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy consumed during the session */,
  "charging_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging point used */,
  "charging_method" TEXT /* Method of charging (e.g., Fast Charging, Slow Charging) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* JSON object containing environmental conditions like temperature, humidity */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the charging session (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Aborted) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_charging_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("charging_point_id") REFERENCES charging_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging cycle */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging session the cycle belongs to */,
  "C_max" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the cycle */,
  "C_max_variance" REAL /* Variance of the maximum capacity */,
  "P" REAL /* Power of the cycle */,
  "P_variance" REAL /* Variance of the power */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage during the cycle */,
  "current" REAL /* Current during the cycle */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the cycle */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the cycle */,
  "cycle_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the cycle in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_cycles_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES charging_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging cycle the reading belongs to */,
  "T_start" REAL /* Starting temperature of the cycle */,
  "T_start_variance" REAL /* Variance of the starting temperature */,
  "T_end" REAL /* Ending temperature of the cycle */,
  "T_end_variance" REAL /* Variance of the ending temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the cycle */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperatures_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES charging_cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soc_readings" (
  "soc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SOC reading */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging cycle the reading belongs to */,
  "SOC_start" REAL /* Starting SOC of the cycle */,
  "SOC_start_variance" REAL /* Variance of the starting SOC */,
  "SOC_end" REAL /* Ending SOC of the cycle */,
  "average_power" REAL /* Average power during the cycle */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Energy consumed during the cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soc_readings_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES charging_cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  "area_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging point */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area the point belongs to */,
  "point_name" TEXT /* Name of the charging point */,
  "point_type" TEXT /* Type of the charging point */,
  "max_power" REAL /* Maximum power output of the charging point */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the charging point (e.g., Available, Occupied, Out of Service) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_points_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
